/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/chi-shell_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/ShellSurface.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/ShellManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/WindowTracker.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/NotificationServer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/SystemStatus.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/WayfireIPC.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/DesktopEntryModel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/chi-shell.dir/src/PinnedAppsModel.cpp.o" -o chi-shell  /usr/lib64/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libLayerShellQtInterface.so.6.6.2 libwlr_protocol.a -lwayland-client -lm /usr/lib64/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libxkbcommon.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so
